quests.title: Atlas Prime Rebuild
quests.desired_end_state: A verified Atlas Prime successor repository with Quest Board continuity, controlled source evolution, recovery proof, and an explicitly approved cutover from Atlas Codex.

emberline.current_gate: Stage 1 draft PRs created; exact-head Noctua audit and merge-consent reconciliation are now required.
completed_durable_work: Codex remains canonical and Prime remains SHADOW.
All 45 approved candidates compiled successfully before publication.
Codex draft PR #183 is open at head 8fb44c9247a8765214b4a525aa0cf5d201ec8735 with 30 changed files.
Prime draft PR #24 is open at head e1eda7e79c27ecf24b6a14b7e74bef2be73fb0ee with 15 changed files.
chat_only_or_uncertain: The draft-PR content is durable on review branches but is not canonical source until separately approved merges and merged-main readback complete.
The Quest completion range remains a broad low-confidence estimate pending merge/readback, C07, later migration gates, recovery proof, and cutover.
remaining_work: Complete Noctua audit against the exact Codex PR #183 and Prime PR #24 heads.
Resolve any audit findings without broadening the approved file boundaries.
Obtain explicit Jayson merge approval bound to the exact audited PR heads.
If approved, merge Codex before Prime and verify merged-main readback.
Keep generated-output follow-through separate and separately gated if required.
Resume C07 and later migration gates after this architecture gate is closed.
Prove Quest Board cutover and rollback before authority changes.
emberline.protected_boundary_posture: No raw Drive, finance, health, clinic, runtime, account, or infrastructure evidence belongs in GitHub.
emberline.next_safe_action: Complete Noctua audit of Codex PR #183 and Prime PR #24 at their exact current heads, then prepare the exact merge-consent gate.
emberline.next_approval_gate: Explicit Jayson merge approval bound to Codex head 8fb44c9247a8765214b4a525aa0cf5d201ec8735 and the final audited Prime PR #24 head after this reconciliation commit.
must_not_happen_yet: Do not merge either PR until Noctua passes on the exact current heads and Jayson gives explicit merge approval.
Do not activate S1, move or delete Drive material, generate or merge follow-through reports, promote Prime, retire Codex, or cut over.

campaigns.title: Atlas Codex to Prime Migration
campaigns.current_gate: Architecture draft PRs #183 and #24 are open under Noctua review; C07 remains the next protected semantic gate after merge and readback closure.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Complete the current exact-head PR audit and preserve C07 as the next separate read-only semantic reconciliation gate.

campaigns.title: Google Drive Dependency Retirement
campaigns.current_gate: The retirement plan, exception register, reconciliation harvest, and policy routing changes are in Codex draft PR #183 and are not canonical until merge/readback.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Audit the Drive-governance changes in Codex PR #183; no Drive mutation or cleanup is authorized.

campaigns.title: Athena's Spear and Artemis's Bow and Arrow
campaigns.current_gate: Stage 1 publication is complete: Codex PR #183 and Prime PR #24 are open as drafts; exact-head Noctua and merge consent are next.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Complete Noctua on both exact PR heads and prepare a separately approved merge-and-readback route if the audit passes.

campaigns.title: Quest Board and Emberline Architecture
campaigns.current_gate: The SHADOW schema, crosswalk, template, and parent Quest checkpoint are in Prime PR #24; this checkpoint has been reconciled to the actual Stage 1 state and requires re-audit.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Re-audit Prime PR #24 at its new head and keep Quest Board authority SHADOW until a separately proven cutover.

completion_range.basis: Control-plane foundation, delta closure, candidate compilation, and coordinated draft PRs exist, but merge/readback, C07, generated follow-through where required, recovery proof, and cutover remain.

quests.next_safe_action: Complete Noctua on the exact current PR heads and prepare the exact merge-consent gate.
quests.next_approval_gate: Explicit Jayson merge approval bound to the final audited Codex PR #183 and Prime PR #24 head SHAs.
